market_pulse: EDC Week momentum sustains strong competitive presence across all major venues; OMNIA Dayclub grand opening draws A-list celebrity crowd, while LIV maintains steady DJ rotation and John Summit/David Guetta headline presence.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA Dayclub grand opening featured LeBron James, Sofia Vergara, Ashley Graham, and Hollywood royalty with MTV-ready coverage and exclusive photo ops. LIV not leveraging similar celebrity exclusivity content.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Secure A-list guest appearances or exclusive talent dinners at LIV; document with professional photography and behind-the-scenes content for IG/TT reels.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA Dayclub opening included 100-foot motorcycle jump, Trojan Horse, and world-record stunt marketing. Competitors using high-production spectacle events.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Plan and execute unique visual/spectacle moment for LIV's next major event; coordinate with content creators for viral TikTok/Reels potential.

content_gaps.description: Venues actively positioning for post-EDC momentum (May 20-24). Encore Beach Club, Calvin Harris, Marshmello dominating daytime pool content.
content_gaps.suggested_action: LIV should emphasize David Guetta residency, John Summit afterparty exclusive content, and late-night positioning vs. daytime competition.

influencer_activity.mention: John Summit performing at LIV Beach EDC Week (May 17, 2026) with KETTAMA; high engagement from fans asking if he noticed them in crowd.
Las Vegas lifestyle influencer (413K followers) with focus on travel and nightlife; frequently tags dayclubs and pool parties.
